Program
  ProgramHead
    PROGRAM: program
    ID: p
  DeclarePart
    VarDecPart
      VarDec
        VAR: var
        VarDecList
          TypeDef
            BaseType
              INTEGER: integer
          VarIDList
            ID: x
          ;: integer
          VarDecList
            TypeDef
              BaseType
                INTEGER: integer
            VarIDList
              ID: y
            ;: ;
  ProgramBody
    BEGIN: begin
    StmList
      Stm
        InputStm
          READ: read
          (: (
          ID: x
          ): )
    END: end
  .: .
